tool.name: GaCDI GDC
tool.description: import datasets from the NCI Genomic Data Commons

param.name: mode
param.label: Selection source
param.option: GDC manifest file (from the portal cart)

param.name: manifest
param.label: GDC manifest
param.help: A manifest exported from the GDC Data Portal (columns: id, filename, md5, size, state).

param.name: query_json
param.label: GDC query JSON
param.help: A JSON document containing a GDC 'filters' object for the files endpoint. May also set 'size' and 'fields'.

tool.help:
**GaCDI — Genomic Data Commons (GDC) importer**
Downloads files from the NCI `Genomic Data Commons <https://gdc.cancer.gov/>`_ into your Galaxy history using the official ``gdc-client``.
**Selection source**
- *GDC manifest file* — export a manifest from your cart on the `GDC Data Portal <https://portal.gdc.cancer.gov/>`_ and upload it here. - *GDC API query (JSON filters)* — provide a JSON document with a ``filters`` object; matching files are enumerated from the GDC REST API and downloaded.
**Controlled access**
For controlled-access files, upload your GDC download token and select it in *Controlled-access token file*. Downloaded controlled data and the token dataset must be handled in accordance with your Data Use Agreement. @HELP_FOOTER@
